scripts.dev: lsof -ti:3001 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null || true; concurrently -n bridge,vite -c cyan,magenta "node bridge/server.js" "vite"
scripts.bridge: lsof -ti:3001 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null || true && node bridge/server.js
scripts.postinstall: cp node_modules/gif.js/dist/gif.worker.js public/gif.worker.js 2>/dev/null || true && cp node_modules/@ffmpeg/core/dist/umd/ffmpeg-core.js public/ 2>/dev/null || true && cp node_modules/@ffmpeg/core/dist/umd/ffmpeg-core.wasm public/ 2>/dev/null || true
